name: Amas Retes (Apple Strudel)
recipeIngredient: 1 Recipe of strudel dough (or substitute phyllo dough)
8 medium Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored and cut thin
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2 Place a sheet of strudel dough on a damp kitchen towel and butter generously with melted butter. Sprinkle with a thin layer of bread crumbs and top with a second sheet of dough. Brush this layer with butter and sprinkle with a few of the bread crumbs. Repeat, making a second strudel base.
3 Toss together the apples, walnuts, sugar, cinnamon, and remaining bread crumbs. Spread half the apple mixture on a three inch strip down the center of each dough, leaving 2 inches of space on each side.
4 Roll the strudels with the aid of the towel, jelly roll fashion, starting at the long side nearest you. Tuck in the edges of the dough and place the strudels seam side down on a buttered baking sheet.
5 Brush generously with remaining butter. Repeat with second strudel.
6 Bake the strudels in a preheated oven for 35-40 minutes. If they are browning too quickly, tent with aluminum foil, but remove it ten minutes before cooking time is complete.
7 Dust the strudels with sifted confectioners sugar and serve warm.
